verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've been on the mountain and the valley so low And it seems I'd never had a place to go Then I meet Jesus, now he is mine Now there's no mountain that we can't climb.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There is no mountain that we can’t climb When I say we, I mean Jesus and I ‘cause I have Jesus, I need not worry There is no mountain we cannot climb.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I was in despair and trouble beseech me Tears filled my eyes and I could not see But I trusted Jesus and his love divine There is no mountain that we can't climb.
